name: openstreetmap-skills
description: Complete OpenStreetMap integration skills: Flutter, Kotlin/Android, backend services, ISP/telecom applications. Covers flutter_map, osmdroid, OSRM routing, Nominatim geocoding, Overpass API, and more.

skills.name: osm-flutter
skills.description: OpenStreetMap integration for Flutter apps using flutter_map ecosystem

skills.name: osm-kotlin
skills.description: OpenStreetMap integration for Android/Kotlin using osmdroid

skills.name: osm-services
skills.description: Backend services: OSRM routing, Nominatim geocoding, Overpass API, tile servers

skills.name: osm-isp
skills.description: OpenStreetMap for ISP and telecom: network planning, infrastructure, coverage
